name: Laniakea Beach
tagline: Known as Turtle Beach — where Hawaiian green sea turtles haul out on the sand right in front of you.
parking: Small roadside lot on Kamehameha Hwy; very limited, watch for traffic pulling in
bestTime: Late morning to early afternoon for best turtle sightings; calmer summer months for swimming
talkStory: Volunteers are usually there to make sure people keep the required 10-ft distance from the honu. Turtles are almost always on the beach — I've never been and not seen at least a few. The swimming isn't the main draw here, it's about the turtle experience. Quick stop on the way to or from Haleiwa town — grab lunch at Haleiwa Joe's after.
